title: Anita & Me
overview: Meena, a 12-year-old living in a mining village in the English Midlands in 1972, is the daughter of Indian parents who've come to England to give her a better life. This idyllic existence is upset by the arrival in the village of Anita Rutter and her dysfunctional family.

trailers.title: Meera Syal on Anita And Me, decolonizing the curriculum and American acting opportunities | BAFTA
